title: thymus hyemalis subsp. fumanifolius
intro: Thymus hyemalis subsp. fumanifolius, also known as winter thyme or creeping thyme, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Thymus hyemalis subsp. fumanifolius include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and aid in digestion. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
